title: Support std::randomize() for queue, dyn_array, and assoc_array variables (#7039)

features.name: queue variable with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include a queue variable (declared with $) used as the argument to std::randomize()

features.name: dynamic array variable with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array variable (declared with []) used as the argument to std::randomize()

features.name: associative array variable with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include an associative array variable (declared with [type]) used as the argument to std::randomize()
